message:
feat(python): numpy.percentile wrapper parity (franken_numpy-ixrw)

Adds a passthrough wrapper for numpy.percentile covering the q
argument, axis, `out=` destination, overwrite_input, method selector,
keepdims, and the keyword-only weights argument. Test covers scalar
q=50 (median) on 1-D, vector q (quartiles), 2-D axis=0/1, all
documented methods (linear/lower/higher/nearest/midpoint), keepdims
shape parity, integer input dtype promotion, and q=0/100 (min/max)
edges.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
